title: AI Runtime is now in Public Preview
body:
Designed for deep learning workloads, AI Runtime brings GPU support to Databricks serverless compute. AI Runtime for single-node tasks is now in [Public Preview](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types).

The distributed training API for multi-GPU workloads remain in [Beta](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types).

See [AI Runtime](/aws/en/machine-learning/ai-runtime).
